Home.title: NEXTY.DEV
Home.tagLine: A Modern Next.js Full-Stack SaaS Template
Home.description: A production-ready Next.js and Supabase starter template for building modern SaaS applications. Launch your content, AI, or subscription service faster.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.description: Sign in with the following methods

Toast.rateLimitDescription: Please wait a moment before trying again.

Email.successDescription: Please check your email for the login link.
Email.errorDescription: Failed to send magic link. Please try again.

OTP.sendSuccessDescription: Please check your email for the verification code.
OTP.sendErrorDescription: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
OTP.verifySuccessDescription: You have been signed in successfully.
OTP.verifyErrorDescription: Invalid or expired verification code. Please try again.

Google.errorDescription: Failed to sign in with Google. Please try again.

AIDemo.title: AI Capabilities
AIDemo.description: Production-ready AI components for chat, image generation, and video generation.
AIDemo.metaDescription: Explore AI capabilities including chat, image generation, and video generation with multiple providers.

hub.chatDescription: Single-turn and multi-turn conversations powered by 18+ language models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, xAI, and OpenRouter.
hub.imageDescription: Text-to-image and image-to-image generation with GPT Image, Nano Banana, Grok, Flux via Replicate and fal.ai.
hub.videoDescription: Text-to-video and image-to-video generation with Seedance, Kling, and Wan via Replicate and fal.ai.
hub.tagline: Drop-in components for developers. Build AI features in minutes.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.metaDescription: AI chat demo with single-turn and multi-turn conversations.
chat.startConversationDescription: Send a message to begin chatting with the AI
chat.typePlaceholder: Type your message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)

image.title: AI Image Generation
image.metaDescription: Generate images with AI using multiple models and providers.
image.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
image.referenceImageRequired: Please upload a reference image for this model.
image.negativePromptPlaceholder: Describe what you don't want in the image...
image.emptyState: Enter a prompt and hit generate to bring your vision to life
image.noSettings: No advanced settings for this model

video.title: AI Video Generation
video.metaDescription: AI video generation demo with text-to-video and image-to-video.
video.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to generate...
video.referenceImageRequired: Please upload a reference image for this model.
video.emptyState: Enter a prompt and hit generate to bring your video to life
video.negativePromptPlaceholder: Describe what you don't want in the video...

subscribe.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
subscribe.defaultErrorMessage: Subscription failed. Please try again later
subscribe.multipleSubmissions: Too many requests. Please try again tomorrow

unsubscribe.title: Newsletter Unsubscription
unsubscribe.success: You have successfully unsubscribed from Nexty newsletters.
unsubscribe.regretMessage: You can resubscribe anytime to receive the latest Nexty updates and tutorials.
unsubscribe.errorGeneric: An error occurred while processing your unsubscribe request
unsubscribe.errorMessage: Please make sure you're using the correct unsubscribe link. If the problem persists, contact our support team for assistance.
unsubscribe.contactPrefixSuccess: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us at:
unsubscribe.notInNewsletter: This email is not in our subscription list
unsubscribe.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from our newsletter? You won't receive updates about new features and content anymore.
unsubscribe.finalWarning: This action cannot be undone. You can always resubscribe later.
unsubscribe.errorInvalidToken: Invalid unsubscribe link. The link may be corrupted or expired.
